title: Musical Tooltips
description: This is a resourcepack made for the Legendary Tooltips mod. Info on how to make it work can be found on the mod's official page.
body:
This resourcepack was designed to work with the [Legendary Tooltips mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips).


It's not an official resourcepack for the mod.


It uses level 10 in the mod's config.


Information on how to apply it can be found on the mod's modrinth page.
